basics.name: Vadim Nicolai
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, Go, and Rust. Expert in modern frontend architectures, microservices, GraphQL APIs, and performance-critical systems. Delivering 5 AI-powered projects with multi-model LLM orchestration, agentic pipelines, RAG search, eval-driven development, and production observability. Domain expertise in E-commerce, FinTech, AI/ML, and enterprise SaaS.
basics.keySkills: React • TypeScript • JavaScript • Next.js • Node.js • Go • Rust • GraphQL • Apollo • REST API • Microservices • gRPC • AWS • Cloudflare • MongoDB • DynamoDB • Docker • CI/CD • Jest • Git • AI/LLM Orchestration

work.name: Vitrifi
work.summary:
• Architected micro-frontend portal using Go microservices with gRPC and OpenAPI, integrating shared React components across multiple teams.
  • Led API migration from REST to GraphQL, implementing Apollo Server in Go and Apollo Client in React, reducing over-fetching and improving performance.
  • Drove frontend architecture and technical leadership across teams, establishing design patterns and enforcing quality through PR reviews.
  • Migrated monorepo from npm to PNPM with Turborepo caching, reducing CI/CD build times.
  • Integration testing strategy with Jest and React Testing Library, automated in CI/CD.
  • Tech stack: Go, Echo, gRPC, GraphQL, Apollo Server, OpenAPI, React, TypeScript, Apollo Client, React Query, Ant Design, Turborepo, PNPM, MongoDB, Jest, React Testing Library

aiProjects.name: ResearchThera.com
aiProjects.description: Therapeutic + clinical-intelligence platform for families. LlamaIndex-powered healthcare RAG ingests lab PDFs into 8 pgvector tables with 7 derived clinical ratios and a 5-stage local-only clinical chat pipeline; a 7-node LangGraph research generator surfaces evidence-based therapeutic content across 7 academic sources. 6 AI agents (3 Python LangGraph + 1 Python LlamaIndex + 2 TypeScript AI SDK) over a GraphQL API.
highlights: LlamaIndex healthcare layer — blood-test PDFs → LlamaParse → custom BloodTestNodeParser (3-tier fallback: HTML tables → Romanian/EU FormKeysValues → tab/multi-space free-text) → FastEmbed (BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5, 1024-dim, local ONNX) IngestionPipeline emitting blood_test + N blood_marker + health_state nodes per upload.

7 derived clinical ratios per upload with authored risk thresholds — TG/HDL (McLaughlin), TC/HDL (Castelli), HDL/LDL (Millán), NLR (Fest), De Ritis AST/ALT, BUN/Creatinine (Hosten), TyG Index (Simental-Mendía) — stored as JSONB on health_state alongside the embedding.

5-stage clinical chat pipeline (pure LlamaIndex, no LangGraph): triage → re_triage (confidence < 0.7, max 2 attempts) → route → ContextChatEngine (SimilarityPostprocessor + ClinicalRelevancePostprocessor + CompactAndRefine) → guard re-check; 9 intents with multi-intent CompositeRetriever fan-out and confidence-scaled k widening (≥0.8 → base, ≥0.6 → 1.5×, else 2×).

8 dedicated 1024-dim pgvector tables (blood_test, blood_marker hybrid FTS+vector, health_state, condition, medication, symptom, appointment, allergy) each paired with a BaseRetriever subclass; search_marker_trend powers longitudinal trajectory queries.
Local-only inference on Apple Silicon — mlx_lm.server with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit, FastEmbed via ONNX Runtime — zero API calls, no PHI egress; LLM_BASE_URL is a one-line swap to a remote model.

Medication deep research LangGraph agent mines drug-biomarker interactions and persists structured pharmacology across 6 tables (pharmacology, indications, dosing, adverse_events, interactions, correlations) powering /medications/[slug] research panels.

7-node therapy research LangGraph (loadContext → normalizeGoal → planQuery → search → enrichAbstracts → extractAll → persist): ~2,350 candidates across 7 academic sources → DeepSeek scoring with 0.72 blended-quality gate → top 20 stored as 1024-dim pgvector embeddings.

~70 PostgreSQL tables via Drizzle ORM after the agentic-healthcare merge: therapeutic core (goals, issues, habits, journals, claims) + 32 healthcare tables (blood tests, conditions, medications, symptoms, appointments, brain protocols, medication pharmacology, plus the 8 pgvector embedding tables).

aiProjects.name: Agentic Lead Gen
aiProjects.description: Autonomous B2B lead generation platform with a 5-agent agentic pipeline (Discovery Scout → Enrichment Specialist → Contact Hunter + QA Auditor → Outreach Composer), GraphQL API backed by Neon PostgreSQL, LLM-powered company enrichment, multilingual JobBERT-v3 embeddings via HuggingFace Inference API, MLX local scoring at 4,618 embeddings/sec, and LangSmith observability.
highlights: 5-agent pipeline: Discovery → Enrichment → Contact Hunter + QA Auditor (parallel) → Outreach Composer with plan-approval gate.
Type-safe GraphQL API (Apollo Server 5, DataLoader N+1 prevention, Drizzle ORM + Neon PostgreSQL, TypeScript codegen).
LLM enrichment: tier classification, tech stack detection, ATS discovery via multi-model routing.
3 competing-hypotheses agents — cross-reading findings — producing GO/NO-GO verdicts.
MLX scoring at 4,618 embeddings/sec on M1; eval enforcer with LangSmith tracing.
TechWolf/JobBERT-v3 multilingual embeddings (768-dim, EN/ES/DE/ZH) via HuggingFace Inference API for semantic job matching; BGE-small INT8 for company search.
Hand-tuned ML scoring: 12-feature contact ranker, 18-feature ICP scorer, Aho-Corasick company classifier — all with INT8 quantization and LUT sigmoid.
Eval-driven strategy enforcer validates every prompt/model change against 80% accuracy bar.

LoRA fine-tuned Qwen3-1.7B-4bit (rank-8, cosine LR, DPO on synthetic data) deployed to HuggingFace Hub (v9ai/outreach-email-qwen3-1.7b-4bit-lora) for personalized outreach email generation; sgai-qwen3-1.7b for schema-constrained HTML→JSON company extraction on dual MLX servers.

aiProjects.name: Knowledge
aiProjects.description: Knowledge graph with pgvector cosine similarity search, Bayesian mastery tracing per user per concept, automated quality evals with DeepEval RAG triad, LangGraph multi-agent fan-out/fan-in editorial pipeline.
highlights: Knowledge graph with 6 relationship types, pgvector cosine similarity at 1024 dimensions.
Per-user Bayesian knowledge tracing (p_mastery, p_transit, p_slip, p_guess per concept), novice → expert classification.
DeepEval: Coherence, Factual Grounding, Completeness at 0.7 threshold; RAG triad evaluation.
LangGraph 6-agent fan-out/fan-in editorial pipeline with multi-round revision loops, DeepSeek R1 + OpenAI.

volunteer.summary:
• Contributed 100+ pull requests to core trading engine and exchange connectivity modules in Rust and Python.
  • Built production exchange adapters for dYdX v4 and Hyperliquid with REST, WebSocket, gRPC, authentication, rate limiting, and execution clients.
  • Enhanced OKX and Kraken integrations with historical data support, pagination, and WebSocket reliability improvements.
  • Implemented high-performance technical indicators in Rust with Python/Cython parity, improving PnL calculations and monetary precision.
